response.justification: Strong 20+ year engineering foundation with proven entrepreneurial track record and teaching ability, but AI expertise is underdeveloped for this Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role. AI-agent infrastructure work is very recent (April 2025) with no demonstrated AI products or platforms. Lacks Master's/PhD in AI and explicit director-level title. Could merit interview if deeper AI work exists beyond what's shown in resume.
strengths: 20+ years of technical experience exceeding the 15-year requirement with consistent progression through increasingly senior roles

Proven entrepreneur and product builder: GISCollective (founded 2016) is an open-source platform serving real organizations like Green Map, demonstrating ability to identify opportunities and execute independently
Strong mentor and thought leader: active in teaching (Selenium courses, workshops), speaking (FOSS4G 2019), and organizing technical communities (Refactoring Dojos)
concerns: AI expertise appears very recent and underdeveloped: AI-agent infrastructure work began April 2025 with no demonstrated AI products or platforms—a core requirement for AI Strategy role
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field (preferred qualification); both degrees are in general Computer Science and arts
No explicit Principal Engineer or Director-level title shown; highest titles are Staff and Senior roles with unclear scope or decision-making authority
